description: Grade 1 Christian Religious Education learning areas for simple Bible stories, values, and prayer.

learningAreas.title: Bible Stories
learningAreas.description: Listen to simple Bible stories and talk about what they teach.

learningAreas.title: Christian Values
learningAreas.description: Learn kindness, sharing, honesty, and respect.

learningAreas.title: Prayer
learningAreas.description: Learn simple prayers and respectful moments of worship.

learningAreas.title: Caring for Others
learningAreas.description: Practise helping family, friends, and people at school.
